target_skill.name: systematic-debug
target_skill.description: Fix bugs systematically — "X is broken", "isn't working", "fix didn't work", "still failing", "why is X happening". Not for features (→ build) or architecture (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: architect
competing_skills.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: systematic-test
competing_skills.description: Verify built code works — "test this", "QA this", "does this work". Auto-fires after build. Not for bugs (→ systematic-debug) or code review (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: review-panel
competing_skills.description: Multi-agent review — "panel review", "Gemini review", "full review", "calibrate scores", "audit my vault". Auto-runs as build Phase 7. Not solo (→ delegate-analytical/adversarial).

positive_cases: The prefill link is broken again — same symptom as last week, photos missing
My v6.3 cap-bump fix didn't work, the cache is still empty on full listings
Why is the bookmarklet returning undefined for those 5 specific listings?
Still failing on the Orchard Dr listing after the latest patch — same error
negative_cases: Write a SPEC.md for the auth rewrite — interview me through the requirements
Build me a React dashboard for vault stats with weekly rollups
QA the new vault filter UI before I ship it
Run a panel review on my new artifact
Plan how I'd structure the data model for the grove-mobile app
